entities.name: MIT Electrofluidic Fiber Muscles
entities.company: MIT Media Lab / Politecnico di Bari
key_features: Combines thin McKibben actuator with miniaturized EHD pump

Can be packed densely and distributed throughout robot structure
Weighs just a few grams per pump, not much thicker than a toothpick

entities.name: Tien Kung Ultra Actuator System
entities.description: X-Humanoid天工Ultra执行器系统，实现了全自主半程马拉松（21.0975公里，1小时15分），零人工干预。Embodied天工2.0在CES 2026上展示了全自主零件分拣和与观众互动。天工3.0赢得北京机器人勇士赛。执行器系统实现了人类反射级别的视觉到运动响应时间。

entities.name: CT-Unite CT-21X GaN Magnetic Encoder
key_findings: China's first GaN-based magnetic encoder chip for humanoid robot joints
Response latency <2μs, bandwidth 1-5 MHz, up to 300,000 rpm
Improves trajectory control accuracy from ±0.2mm to ±0.05mm

entities.name: Intel Core Ultra Series 3
key_findings: Edge AI robotics compute platform combining CPU, GPU, and NPU on one SoC
Replaces bulky discrete GPUs in robots — reduced heat and cost
Powers Ella service robot (200 drinks/hour) with 3 concurrent AI agents
Adopted by Trossen Robotics, Circulus (Korea), Oversonic (Italy)

entities.name: HONPINE HPJM Integrated Joint Module
key_findings: Deep integration of 6 core components into single compact unit
50+ different joint module specifications for flexible development
Hollow-shaft routing with 31.5mm bore in 120mm outer diameter
24-bit dual-encoder with multi-turn absolute power-loss memory
Salient-pole magnetic circuit permanent magnet brake design
